name: Fettuccine with Goat Cheese and Peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the bell peppers into thin slices and set aside.
2. Pit and coarsely chop the olives and set aside.
3. Place tomatoes in a shallow pan and cover with boiling water for 2 minutes. Drain, reserving 1/4 cup of the liquid. Thinly slice the tomatoes and set aside.
4. Heat olive oil in a large nonstick skillet; add scallions and garlic. Stir frequently while cooking for 2 minutes.
5. Add peppers to the pan and cook for 3 minutes or until just tender. Add chicken broth and cook until most of the liquid has evaporated.
6. Reduce heat, then add tomatoes and the reserved liquid, basil, olives, capers, and oregano. Simmer for 5 minutes.
7. Cook fettuccine in a large serving bowl according to package instructions; add crumbled goat cheese and toss until melted.
8. Add pepper mixture and toss until well mixed.
